title: Rebuild production backend systems as on-chain Rust programs

audit.reason: The proposal outlines a clear plan to rebuild production backend systems as on-chain Rust programs. It includes a thorough analysis of existing backend systems and a detailed design for on-chain Rust programs. The provided code snippets for user authentication and data storage are well-structured and demonstrate a good understanding of the requirements.
audit.improvements: Consider adding more detailed descriptions of the transaction processing and API endpoints components. Additionally, providing more comprehensive code examples for all key components would strengthen the proposal.
